title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion hosts a Reactive Extrusion Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science and extrusion technology within the Charlotte region.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: Woman with a criminal history arrested two weeks after stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about violent crime and public safety in Charlotte, especially for vulnerable populations.

title: Repeat Offender Accused in Harris Teeter Stabbing
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the effectiveness of the justice system and the safety of public spaces.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
